name: OpenProject Notifications
description: A single top-panel indicator for OpenProject, backed by the openproject-cli tool. Its menu has two columns: in-app notifications on the left (unread badge, mark read/unread, open in browser, banners) and, on the right, your current and previously-assigned tasks (newest first) plus a logged-vs-planned work-hours summary from your start date. The panel icon colour reflects unread notifications only; the work-log status is shown coloured inside the menu. Connection is configured once via 'openproject-cli auth login'. Works on GNOME 49-50.
